message.content:
Explore the backend API at C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\api\ thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. Full file tree
2. All route definitions and how they're organized
3. Current Prisma schema (schema.prisma) - all models
4. prisma.config.ts
5. How Hono is set up (main entry point, middleware, CORS)
6. The types package at packages/types/src/ - all exported types
7. Any existing WebSocket or real-time infrastructure

Return full file contents for each relevant file.
